ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who recorded the song */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the song belongs to */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the song */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the song */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the song */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the song file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the song file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Primary genre of the artist */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the artist entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the artist entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the artist entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the artist entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who recorded the album */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the album */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL of the album cover art */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks in the album */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the album entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the album entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the album entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the album entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart entry */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song being tracked */,
  "chart_date" TEXT /* Date of the chart */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the song on the chart */,
  "spins" INTEGER /* Number of spins the song received */,
  "move" INTEGER /* Change in chart position */,
  "adds" INTEGER /* Number of new adds for the song */,
  "stations" INTEGER /* Number of stations playing the song */,
  "chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the chart */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the chart */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the chart entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the chart entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the chart entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the chart entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charts_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_types" (
  "chart_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart type */,
  "chart_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the chart type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the chart type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the chart type entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the chart type entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the chart type entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the chart type entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chart_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart entry */,
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart entry */,
  "chart_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chart type */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the song on the chart */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the chart entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the chart entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the chart entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the chart entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_entries_chart_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_type_id") REFERENCES chart_types ("chart_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chart_entries_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("chart_id") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., artist, label, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the user entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the user entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, artist, label) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the role entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the role entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role associated with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view charts, edit songs) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the permission entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the permission entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_relationships" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User associated with the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role associated with the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the user-role entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user-role entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the user-role entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user-role entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_relationships_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_relationships_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permission_history" (
  "permission_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission history entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User associated with the permission history entry */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role associated with the permission history entry */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Permission associated with the permission history entry */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken on the permission (e.g., grant, revoke) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the permission history entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission history entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permission_history_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES user_permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permission_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permission_history_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_log" (
  "audit_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed on the database (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected by the action */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected by the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the audit log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_log_id")
)
